parts.label: Primary Structure (3U)

parts.spec: Integration_harness closure spine with harness_channel, connector_keying, assembly_datum pads, routing clips, service hatch, reciprocal interface labels, inspection checklist marks

requirements: Provide a robust 3U frame for CubeSat.
Support deployable rail guides for easy deployment.
Include PC/104 standoffs for electronic boards.

risk.desc: Potential thermal expansion issues due to mixed materials (Al 7075 and CFRP).
risk.mit: Conduct thermal analysis and adjust material selection if necessary.

risk.desc: Standoff placement may affect the overall stiffness of the structure.
risk.mit: Perform finite element analysis to optimize standoff locations.

risk.desc: Access panels might interfere with the deployable rail guides.
risk.mit: Review panel design to ensure it does not obstruct rail deployment.

risk.desc: PC/104 stack may not provide sufficient clearance for all components.
risk.mit: Increase stack spacing or redesign stack layout for better clearance.

risk.desc: Corner posts could be overdesigned, leading to unnecessary weight.
risk.mit: Optimize corner post dimensions to reduce weight while maintaining strength.

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: 3U frame, deployer rails, board stack support
physics_paths: Load path: Corner posts distribute structural loads to the frame.
Thermal path: Heat dissipation through aluminum frame.
Motion path: Deployable rail guide grooves enable deployment.
Electrical/Data path: PC/104 stack supports electronic boards.
Human/Service access path: Access panels provide serviceability.
integration_opportunities: Add deployable rail guide grooves for easier deployment.
Include access panels for maintenance and serviceability.
Ensure PC/104 stack is robust enough to support electronics.
Optimize corner posts for weight and strength balance.
verification_focus: Proper clearance for deployable rail guides.

risk.desc: Potential thermal expansion mismatch between aluminum and CFRP materials may affect antenna alignment post-deployment.
risk.mit: Conduct thermal cycling tests during qualification to validate alignment stability.

risk.desc: Burn wire release mechanism could fail if wire is not properly tensioned.
risk.mit: Implement redundant release mechanisms and conduct pre-flight burn wire tension tests.

risk.desc: Latching tab may not engage properly if alignment is off due to manufacturing tolerances.
risk.mit: Include alignment guides and conduct alignment verification tests during assembly.

risk.desc: RF connector accessibility might be compromised if surrounding structures interfere.
risk.mit: Ensure sufficient clearance around RF connector and conduct accessibility checks during assembly.

risk.desc: Deploy hinge durability may be compromised if lubrication is not applied correctly.
risk.mit: Specify lubrication type and application method in assembly instructions and conduct durability tests.

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Cold gas propulsion thruster bracket, 4 thrusters cross-pattern, 50mN class, plumbing manifold
physics_paths: Load path: Thrust force from cold gas thrusters transferred through bracket to satellite structure.
Flow path: Propellant gas flows through plumbing manifold to thrusters.
Thermal path: Heat dissipation from thrusters to bracket and satellite structure.
Motion path: No relative motion, fixed position.
Pressure path: Pressure from propellant gas in plumbing manifold.
Electrical/Data path: Electrical connections from control electronics to thrusters.
